sourceMovie.title: Yesterday
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Yesterday works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Trolls World Tour
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Yesterday clicked for you, Trolls World Tour (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Yesterday?
faq.answer: Try Trolls World Tour, Nick and Norah's Infinite Playlist, Yellow Submarine—each shares DNA with Yesterday while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Yesterday?
faq.answer: Yesterday (2019) is best described as Comedy, Fantasy, Music, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Yesterday worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
